name: lean-ctx
description: LeanCTX (Lean Context) — context intelligence for AI agents. One local binary that decides what your agents read, remembers what they learn, guards what they touch, and proves what they save. 60–90% fewer tokens as the receipt. 30+ tools, Rust, local-first.
summaryZh: LeanCTX (Lean Context) — context intelligence for AI agents. One local binary that decides what your agents read, remembers what they learn, guards what they touch, and proves what they save. 60–90% fewer tokens as the receipt. 30+ tools, Rust, local-first. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
